title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.211 - Minority Health Month designated for month of April
text:
9.211.  Minority Health Month designated for month of April. — The month of April of each year is hereby designated as "Minority Health Month".  The citizens of this state are encouraged to engage in appropriate events and activities to commemorate minority health month.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738 § 8)
